SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AnalysisResult
The complete result of a stateful-bean analysis run across one or more packages.
AnnotationNames
Centralised string constants for annotation class names used across the library.
BeanClassAnalyzer
Orchestrates all sub-analysers against a single bean class and produces an optional BeanViolation.
BeanViolation
Aggregates all violations found on a single Spring Bean class.
ClasspathPackageScanner
Scans the current classpath for classes in the given packages, without requiring a Spring ApplicationContext.
ExcludeFromStatefulCheck
Marks a Spring Bean class or a specific field as deliberately excluded from the stateful-bean check.
FieldAnalyzer
Inspects the declared fields of a class and produces FieldViolations for any field that represents mutable state unsuitable for a shared Spring Bean.
FieldViolation
Represents a single field-level statefulness violation detected on a Spring Bean class.
LombokClassAnalyzer
Detects Lombok annotations at the class level that imply generated mutability.
SetterMethodAnalyzer
Detects public/package-private setter methods on a bean class that are not Spring setter-injection points.
SpringBeanExtractor
Extracts a beanName → beanClass map from a live Spring ApplicationContext, filtering out infrastructure beans that are not user-authored (framework internals, Spring Boot auto-configuration, etc.).
SpringStatefulBeanTest
Composite annotation for running stateful-bean checks against a live Spring ApplicationContext.
SpringStatefulBeanTestExtension
JUnit 5 extension that backs SpringStatefulBeanTest.
StatefulBeanCheck
Marks a JUnit 5 test class as a stateful-bean check.
StatefulBeanCheckConfig
Immutable configuration for a stateful-bean check run.
StatefulBeanCheckConfig.Builder
 
StatefulBeanChecker
Primary entry point for stateful-bean analysis.
StatefulBeanCheckExtension
JUnit 5 extension that executes the stateful-bean check before any test methods run in the annotated class.
ViolationType
Describes why a field or class was flagged as a statefulness violation.
